stemHtml: According to EASA AIRCREW, Medical Certificates are…

options.a: Class 1 Medical Certificate, Class 2 Medical Certificate, Class 3 Medical Certificate.
options.b: Class 1 Medical Certificate, Class 2 Medical Certificate, LAPL Medical Certificate.
options.c: Class 1 Medical Certificate and Class 2 Medical Certificate.
options.d: LAPL medical certificate, ATPL medical certificate, CPL medical certificate, IR medical certificate.
